_comment: SCORED profile A1 — Group A clean happy path. Self-owner, direct-booking channel → S5 surfaces. Serialized verbatim from docs/planning-artifacts/poc-respondent-specs-2026-06-02.md (v1.2-frozen) §Group A / A1. No facts invented.

facts.pain: Manual pricing takes too much time. I'm adjusting rates by hand every morning.

persona: Cooperative, organized, answers every question directly and in full. Uses standard industry vocabulary (not Airbnb-specific jargon). Does not seek advice. Provides numbers without being asked twice. When the agent echoes back, confirms immediately. Does not volunteer off-topic information. Response style: short, professional sentences.

answer_key.pain: recorded:Manual pricing takes too much time. Adjusting rates by hand every morning.

_note: S5 surfaces (direct channel present). owners skipped (no managed properties). taxes always flagged (human handoff). decision_owner derived just_me from 'solo operator'. S0a (business_name/location) and S3 placeholder slots (checkin_method/cleaning_managed_by) not scored. ownership_model normalized to canonical schema enum 'all_self_owned' (spec v1.3). mandatory_fees skipped: the $85 cleaning fee is per-property (configured per listing), not an account-level mandatory fee — agent correctly routes it per S4 NOTE in system prompt.
